title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Released
description: Google released Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite as its fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model. The preview focused on high-volume developer workloads where low latency, lower cost, and good quality all matter at scale.
highlights: Preview availability in Gemini API and Vertex AI

sources.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
